items.description: When your sworn duty is to fight incorporeal demons made of pure engery, you'd better be able to see the entire EM spectrum.

items.name: Rock Cap
items.description: We built this city. We built this city on ROBLOX oh... and on Rock and Roll, I guess? No one calls it that anymore? Just rock now. Okay. Let's just say we built it on ROBLOX? ROBLOX and Rock forever!

items.description: A light from the old Hickory mine? Impossible. That pit ain't been worked since the last cave-in. And you'll stay away from it if'n you know what's good for you. Folks say it's cursed...

items.description: Robots don't play baseball, but this cap is dope.
